---
title: "Carlos Marín"
toc: false
---

::: {.profile-header}
::: {.profile-left}
![](../images/equipo/carlos.jpg){.profile-photo-large}

::: {.profile-links}
[✉](mailto:carlos.marin@posgrado.ecologia.edu.mx)
:::
:::

::: {.profile-right}
**PhD Student**  
Instituto de Ecología, A.C. (INECOL)

*Interests:* [Lizards]{.profile-tag} [Herpetology]{.profile-tag} [Macroevolution]{.profile-tag} [Systematics of Amphibians and Reptiles]{.profile-tag}

I am an evolutionary biologist and herpetologist interested in understanding the environmental and historical factors shaping the geographical gradients of biodiversity through the lens of macroecology and macroevolution. Currently, I am a PhD student at INECOL evaluating the environmental correlates of endemism and lineage diversification gradients in a Neotropical lizard radiation.

### Education

- **PhD** — Instituto de Ecología, A.C. (ongoing)
- **MSc** — Universidad de Antioquia, Colombia (2019)
- **BSc** — Universidad de Antioquia, Colombia (2015)
:::
:::

::: {.profile-back}
[← Back to Team](../equipo.html)
:::
